hero.title: Image Model Playground
hero.description: Use points to call backend-managed image models directly. Pick a model, apply a prompt shell, add paper content, and generate immediately.

meta.saved: The generated image has been saved to History Files

managedNotice: This page lets you switch between backend-managed image models directly. No manual API URL or API Key is required in managed mode, and each generation consumes points.

models.title: Models
models.gemini31Desc: Faster and suitable for most academic illustrations and infographics.
models.geminiProDesc: More stable on detail-heavy scientific visuals.
models.gptImage2Desc: OpenAI-style generation with strong structure and standard visual output.
models.gptImage2AllDesc: A lighter variant for rapid prompt iteration and quick trials.

controls.gptImage2AllNotice: Image 2 All does not support adjustable aspect ratio, resolution, size, or quality on this API, so those controls are intentionally hidden.

templates.title: Templates
templates.researchDesc: Good for method diagrams, workflows, infographics, and result summaries.
templates.csDesc: Good for model architecture, system diagrams, algorithms, and module relations.
templates.bioDesc: Good for mechanism diagrams, experiment flows, cell pathways, and medical infographics.

inputs.paperPlaceholder: Describe the paper, method, theme, or the figure you want to generate.
inputs.extraPlaceholder: Add color, style, layout, density, whitespace, or other visual constraints.

result.title: Preview
result.partial: {{success}} images succeeded and {{failed}} images failed in this batch.
result.loadingDesc: Backend requests are running in parallel. Only successful images will be billed.

errors.promptRequired: Please enter paper content or a topic first.
errors.apiRequired: This deployment uses user-provided API mode. Please fill in API URL and API Key.
